Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-11-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-24-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Haksoon Chang'S Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents On The Court'S Own Motion
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BETZY BRAS-GONZALEZ, ESQ. of Bracamontes & Vlasak (Tel: 415-835-6777) appearing for the plaintiff;
Atty. ERIC E. KIM, ESQ. of Lewis Brisbois (Tel: 415-438-5915) appearing for defendants

Hearing Re: Plaintiff Haksoon Chang's Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents.

Both sides stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge. Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The Motion is granted. Defendant shall produce unredacted responsive documents within 10 days. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HAKSOON CHANG'S Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents is continued to February 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. on the court's own motion. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
